2603.25942.title: Reinforcing Structured Chain-of-Thought for Video Understanding
2603.25942.paper_summary: Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) show promise in video understanding. However, their reasoning often suffers from thinking drift and weak temporal comprehension, even when enhanced by Reinforcement Learning (RL) techniques like Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). Moreover, existing RL methods usually depend on Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT), which requires costly Chain-of-Thought (CoT) annotation and multi-stage training, and enforces fixed reasoning paths, limiting MLLMs' ability to generalize and potentially inducing bias. To overcome these limitations, we introduce Summary-Driven Reinforcement Learning (SDRL), a novel single-stage RL framework that obviates the need for SFT by utilizing a Structured CoT format: Summarize -> Think -> Answer. SDRL introduces two self-supervised mechanisms integrated into the GRPO objective: 1) Consistency of Vision Knowledge (CVK) enforces factual grounding by reducing KL divergence among generated summaries; and 2) Dynamic Variety of Reasoning (DVR) promotes exploration by dynamically modulating thinking diversity based on group accuracy. This novel integration effectively balances alignment and exploration, supervising both the final answer and the reasoning process. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on seven public VideoQA datasets.
2603.25942.paper_summary_zh: 多模態大型語言模型（MLLMs）在視頻理解方面顯示出潛力。<lb/>然而，即使在通過強化學習（RL）技術如群體相對策略優化（GRPO）增強的情況下，它們的推理仍然常常受到思維漂移和弱時間理解的影響。<lb/>此外，現有的RL方法通常依賴於監督微調（SFT），這需要昂貴的思維鏈（CoT）標註和多階段訓練，並強制固定的推理路徑，限制了MLLMs的泛化能力，並可能引入偏見。<lb/>為了克服這些限制，我們提出了基於摘要的強化學習（SDRL），這是一種新穎的單階段RL框架，通過利用結構化的思維鏈格式來消除對SFT的需求：摘要 -> 思考 -> 回答。<lb/>SDRL引入了兩個自我監督機制，整合到GRPO目標中：1）視覺知識的一致性（CVK）通過減少生成摘要之間的KL散度來強化事實基礎；2）推理的動態多樣性（DVR）通過根據群體準確性動態調節思維多樣性來促進探索。<lb/>這種新穎的整合有效地平衡了對齊和探索，監督最終答案和推理過程。<lb/>我們的方法在七個公共視頻問答數據集上達到了最先進的性能。
2603.25942.author: Peiyao Wang et.al.
2603.25942.authors: Peiyao Wang, Haotian Xu, Noranart Vesdapunt, Rui Hou, Jingyi Zhang, Haibin Ling, Oleksandr Obiednikov, Ning Zhou, Kah Kuen Fu
